bullets.body: **Microsoft Agent 365 Registry Sync (May 1 public preview) — kasama ng May 1 GA, ang Microsoft ay nag-shi-ship ng cross-cloud Agent Registry Sync sa AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform; Defender per-agent relationship-map ay nagpapakita ng MCP servers + identities + cloud resources bilang single ops view; integrates with Entra ID + Purview + Intune + Defender; Anthropic Claude Code + GitHub Copilot CLI named bilang upcoming local-agent integrations pagkatapos ng open-source OpenClaw entry path; MCP SDK monthly downloads ~97M sa March 2026** — Unang widely-deployed cross-cloud agent-identity primitive; pinabilis ang MCP-Gateway thesis mula "single-vendor product wave" patungo sa "registry-protocol interop".

bullets.body: **Microsoft Agent 365 GA carry-forward — $15/user/month (M365 E7 SKU sa $99/user); three pillars (observe / govern / secure); tools management para sa MCP server allow/block; June 2026 Defender ay magdadagdag ng asset-context mapping per agent (devices, MCP servers, identities, cloud resources); GCC + GCC High late 2026, DoD early 2027** — Standing baseline para sa agent-control-plane category.

sections.category: Local LLM Optimization (Fine-tuning, KV-cache, Inference) > vLLM

bullets.body: **vLLM v0.20.0 (Apr 27) carry sa May 3 — patches CVE-2026-0994; HuggingFace Transformers v5+ compatibility fixes; PyTorch 2.11 para sa CUDA + XPU; Python 3.14 idinagdag sa supported list; Model Runner V2 + day-one Gemma 4 support sa E2B / E4B / 26B MoE / 31B Dense; baseline v0.18.0 — gRPC serving + GPU NGram speculative decoding + FlexKV cache offload backend; CUDA 13.0 default** — Standing reference.

sections.category: Local LLM Optimization (Fine-tuning, KV-cache, Inference) > SGLang

bullets.body: **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) — still unpatched into May 3 (~14 days post-disclosure, ang longest-running unpatched 2026 LLM-tooling CVE); v0.5.10 ships exploitable; jinja2.Environment() sa halip na ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment para sa tokenizer.chat_template enables RCE sa /v1/rerank via crafted GGUF model file; CERT/CC mitigation guidance: substitute ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment hanggang umupstream fix; cross-server class sa vLLM + LMDeploy + Apr 28 Spring AI + Apr 26 LiteLLM** — Maintainer-coordination yields no upstream fix; PoC continues to circulate; CERT/CC VU#915947 active.

**SGLang TurboQuant integration carry — PR #21419 in-tree (`--kv-cache-dtype turboquant`); follow-up #23134 fused-Triton-decode/extend kernel rewrite hitting 93–105% bf16 throughput vs ~1% sa original implementation** — Standing reference.

citations.label: GitHub Issue - SGLang #23134 TurboQuant fused Triton kernels

citations.label: GitHub Discussion - llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant Extreme KV Cache Quantization

bullets.body: **Ollama v0.21.x carry — `max` think-parameter + improved OpenAI response mapping para sa reasoning effort; Hermes + GitHub Copilot CLI integration sa `ollama launch`; Gemma 4 MLX text-only runtime** — Standing baseline.

sections.category: Local LLM Optimization (Fine-tuning, KV-cache, Inference) > Unsloth

bullets.body: **Unsloth 2026.4.8 (PyPI) carry-forward sa May 1-3 — inference 20-30% faster (parity with llama-server / llama.cpp); GGUF export expanded sa full fine-tunes; auto-detect ng LM Studio / HF / similar pre-existing models; faster MoE 30B-A3B (17.5GB VRAM) + 235B-A22B; MoE 12x faster + 35% less VRAM + 6x longer context via new Triton + math kernels with no accuracy loss; Gemma-4-E2B 8GB VRAM training (~1.5x faster, ~60% less VRAM than FA2); new model support DeepSeek-OCR 2 / GLM-4.7-Flash / Kimi-2.5; Unsloth Studio local no-code UI; ~1.8-3.3x faster embedding fine-tuning; 7x longer-context RL via new batching algorithms** — Standing on-device fine-tuning baseline kasama ng Bonsai-8B + TurboQuant; per project memory ang Unsloth ay dapat hanapin sa bawat daily-update run.

**Unsloth Studio (carry) — local no-code UI na may bagong shutdown button + proper terminal-close behavior; positioned para sa on-device fine-tune + inference + GGUF-export round-trip** — Standing reference.

sections.category: Local LLM Optimization (Fine-tuning, KV-cache, Inference) > KV-Cache Compression Stack

bullets.body: **TurboQuant (Google Research, ICLR 2026, arxiv 2504.19874) carry — 3.5-bit-per-value KV-cache compression matching FP16 sa LongBench / Needle-in-a-Haystack with no retraining; 6x compression, 8x faster attention; community ports sa MLX + Triton + vLLM + SGLang** — Standing carry-forward.

**PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) carry — shared asymmetrically-compressed KV-pool para sa multi-agent LLM inference; int8 keys + 3-bit TurboQuant-MSE values via HF DynamicCache injection; sa Llama-3-8B na may 15 agents sharing 4K-token context cuts KV-cache memory mula 19.8GB sa 0.45GB (-97.7%)** — Carry.

**arxiv 2604.24647 — "DepthKV: Layer-Dependent KV Cache Pruning for Long-Context LLM Inference"** — Layer-dependent KV-cache pruning calibrated per-layer sa halip na uniform compression ratio; complements PolyKV's cross-agent sharing pattern.
**arxiv 2604.10235 — CodeComp: Structural KV Cache Compression for Agentic Coding** carry.
**arxiv 2604.25080 — CacheFlow: Efficient LLM Serving with 3D-Parallel KV Cache Restoration** carry.
**arxiv 2604.03143 — TokenDance: Scaling Multi-Agent LLM Serving via Collective KV Cache Sharing** carry.
**arxiv 2604.19769 — TTKV: Temporal-Tiered KV Cache for Long-Context LLM Inference** carry.
**NVIDIA kvpress carry — Decoding-Press maturity; ExpectedAttentionPress with configurable compression ratios (0.7 / 0.5); AIME25 + Math500 + LongBench benchmarks** — Standing baseline.

sections.category: AI Security > CVE / KEV / Threat Intelligence (CVSS ≥ 8.0)

bullets.body: **CISA KEV May 1 carry — CVE-2026-31431 "Copy Fail" Linux kernel local privilege escalation; CVSS 7.8 ngunit BOD-22-01 mandatory; federal remediation deadline May 15; algif_aead AF_ALG socket + splice() interaction enables 4-byte write sa kernel page cache ng anumang readable file, corrupting in-memory representation ng /usr/bin/su to yield root nang hindi binabago ang on-disk binary; affects virtually every Linux distro mula 2017 onward (Ubuntu 24.04 LTS, Amazon Linux 2023, RHEL 10.1, SUSE 16, Debian, Fedora, Arch); multiple in-the-wild attacks laban sa US think tanks + European manufacturing + cloud service providers; chains with web-app/VPN-appliance RCE para sa initial foothold** — Largest single-vendor KEV-affected install base ng 2026; 14-day federal deadline ay second-tightest ng taon.

citations.label: Microsoft Security Blog - CVE-2026-31431 Copy Fail

bullets.body: **CISA KEV Apr 30 carry — adds CVE-2026-41940 WebPros cPanel & WHM Missing-Authentication-for-Critical-Function; federal deadline May 21** — Standing carry; ang cPanel ay nag-ma-manage ng tens of thousands ng shared-hosting fleets.

**LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (CVSS 9.3) carry — pre-auth SQLi laban sa /chat/completions Authorization header; isang litellm_credentials row leaks OpenAI org keys + Anthropic admin tokens + AWS Bedrock IAM credentials; patched sa v1.83.7-stable Apr 19; first observed exploitation Apr 26 16:17 UTC (~26h post-advisory)** — Ang 2026 LLM-gateway-as-blast-radius case.

**SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) — still unpatched into May 3 (~14 days post-disclosure)** — Maintainer-coordination yields no upstream fix; ang longest-running 2026 unpatched LLM-tooling CVE.

**May 1 fresh CVE wave carry — UTT HiPER 1200GW CVE-2026-7512 + CVE-2026-7513 (CVSS 8.8 strcpy-class router); IBM Langflow Desktop CVE-2026-6543 (CVSS 8.8 arbitrary command execution); Apr 30 wave continues — CVE-2026-7503 / CVE-2026-6389 / CVE-2026-7551 (lahat CVSS 8.8)** — Standing carry.

sections.category: Bay Area / SV AI Meet-up Events

bullets.body: **AI Tinkerers SF Generative UI Global Hackathon: Agentic Interfaces (May 9) — engineers nag-bu-build ng agentic UIs from model output, supported by Google DeepMind + CopilotKit; build interactive UIs from model output gamit ang cutting-edge protocols, defining ang generative UI stack through tool-enabled interface execution** — Unang Bay Area "agentic interfaces" hackathon na may foundation-lab + UI-toolkit sponsorship.
**AgentCon SF May 4 (carry) — agent + skills + harness conference cadence sa May/June; call for speakers earlier in April** — Standing carry.

**LangChain Interrupt SF May 13-14 (carry) — main agent conference sa The Midway, 900 Marin St., SF Dogpatch; Day 1 keynote 9:30 AM kasama ng Harrison Chase + Shreya Shankar; sessions sa building/debugging/shipping reliable agents alongside LangChain product experts; lessons from Clay / Rippling / Workday production** — Standing carry.

**Microsoft Build June 2-3 SF (Fort Mason, carry) — 8 distinct session formats (deep-dive talks, interactive labs, peer-collaborative debugging); in-person attendance pinaliit sa ~2,500 (down from 5,000+ sa prior years); Satya Nadella opening keynote sa AI strategy + Azure roadmap + dev tooling; GitHub + Microsoft Foundry leadership presenting; in-person tickets $1,099; keynotes livestreamed free** — Standing carry; ang post-Agent-365-GA platform anchor.

citations.label: Thurrott - Microsoft Build 2026 Session Catalog Live

bullets.body: **AI Council SF May 12-14 (carry) — multi-track AI conference focused sa AI infrastructure + applications + governance** — Carry.
**SaaStr Annual + Deploy '26 May 12-14 (carry) — agent + skills + harness conference cadence overlapping sa LangChain Interrupt + AI Council window** — Carry.

citations.label: Bond AI - San Francisco and Bay Area Events Calendar

bullets.body: **Simon Willison May 2 weblog "Sightings" — small JS app fetching iNaturalist data para sa personal homepage syndication, built on phone with Claude Code for web; backfills decade ng iNaturalist observations sa site search + date archive pages** — Personal-AI-as-headless-tooling data point; same dormant-pool 'Headless Everything' adjacency bilang ang May 1 Codex CLI 0.128.0 changelog discussion.

**Powell stays sa Federal Reserve Board past May 15 Chair-term expiration carry (first Fed Chair since 1948 to remain on Board); Warsh nomination confirmed by Senate Banking Apr 29; full-Senate vote pending; Powell on Board through 2028; Apr Jobs Report May 8 first major non-earnings macro tape patungong Chair handoff** — Carry sa May 5 AMD + May 8 Apr Jobs week.

citations.label: PBS - Powell stays on Fed Board

bullets.body: **State Department + Treasury joint Iran enforcement May 1 carry — designates Qingdao Haiye Oil Terminal Co. (China terminal na nag-import ng tens of millions ng barrels ng sanctioned Iranian crude); Treasury sanctions 3 Iranian currency exchange houses + IRGC/MODAFL-linked individuals processing billions annually; layered with Trump's standing 25% secondary-tariff threat sa Iran trading partners + 50% tariff threat sa weapons suppliers** — Largest single-day Iran package ng Q2 2026; the WTI +12% week-on-week move ang structural macro consequence.
